response.step_by_step_log: Observed the video throughout for vocal music. The content features virtual characters playing a bomb defusal game. Audio tracks consist only of background instrumental music and character dialogue/banter. No vocal songs were found, therefore no searches were performed.
response.global_summary: Gameplay session featuring VTubers playing a bomb defusal mini-game, including dialogue and tongue-twister challenges. No vocal music is present.

scenes.description: Game introduction and Levels 1-3. Characters attempt to defuse bombs.
Level 4: A character recites a tongue twister to disarm the bomb.
Scoring intermission, loading screen, and final scene.
